observations.polarity: Body feels heavy and distant vs. Dreamwork takes something intangible
observations.summary: Dan experiences a physical disconnection from his body, feeling it as heavy and ill-fitting, while the dreamwork is described as having taken something from him, affecting his physical and mental state.

left_evidence.quote: His body felt wrong—heavy and distant, as if he were wearing it like an ill-fitting coat.

right_evidence.quote: The dreamwork had taken something from him.

bridge_evidence.quote: He could feel it in his bones, in the strange thickness of his throat, in the way his thoughts moved sluggishly through his skull like honey through winter air.
